$$ \lim_{t \to x+1} \frac{t^2f(x+1) - (x+1)^2f(t)}{f(t) - f(x+1)} = 1 $$. Find the value of $$ \lim_{x \to 1} \frac{\ln(f(x)) - \ln 2}{x-1} $$.
question:
